source: https://play.pokemonshowdown.com/data/pokedex.json (the data the Showdown server runs this format on)
stat_convention: lvl50 = level 50, 31 IVs, 252 EVs in the better attacking stat and in Speed, boosting nature on that attacker. This APPROXIMATES a real set - it is not the opponent's actual spread, which closed sheets never reveal.
